programme.desc: Loved-up oyster farmer Az thinks he’s made it. But when an elaborate proposal goes awry and his girlfriend Jess breaks his heart, Az is forced to confront his understanding of what happiness really looks like – both hers and his own.

programme.title: Helen Dorn: A Little Bit Of Freedom
programme.desc: Haunted by a missing boy's case from 14 years ago, Helen Dorn recently discovers a lead linking to the alleged perpetrator, Ron Faber. Dorn immediately heads for Hamburg when she learns that Faber was apprehended with a deceased Chinese boy in his van.

programme.title: The Apple of My Eye
programme.desc: Elise is beautiful, funny, and blind. Theo is a seducer but a loser. They love music. But when they meet in the elevator, it's hate at first sight.

programme.title: You Are Not Alone
programme.desc: When Eva returns to her house on the day of her divorce, she finds a bouquet of red roses outside the door. Attached is the note: "You are not alone." The sender is anonymous.

programme.title: In His Hands
programme.desc: Clara, a lawyer, leads a serene but monotonous life alongside her husband Damien and their two children. One evening, she succumbs to the charm of a mysterious sculptor. This one scorching night will have dramatic repercussions for her and her family.

programme.title: Deep In The Wood
programme.desc: During the Krampus festival, little Tommi disappears mysteriously in the woods. He is found 5 years later in a building site on the outskirts of Naples, but his parents and the town locals are suspicious and frightened by his strange behaviour.

programme.title: Passed by Censor
programme.desc: In an Istanbul prison, Zakir is tasked with reading and censoring the letters inmates receive. Tasked with a writing assignment for his night class, Zakir uses a photograph of an inmate's wife for inspiration, but fantasy soon morphs into delusion.

programme.title: Helen Dorn: The Seeds Of Violence
programme.desc: At the Hamburg DOM festival, Helen Dorn and forensic scientist Weyer witness a paramedic's brutal assault. When a high-society boy is later found dead, unravelling a dark secret linking the two cases.

programme.title: Hunters On A White Field
programme.desc: Deep in the Swedish woods, three friends go on an extended weekend hunting trip. After an initial spell of success, the animals suddenly vanish without a trace. Despite being in a forest without animals, the men decide that the hunt must continue.

programme.title: Traces Of Sandalwood
programme.desc: Adopted and living in Spain for years, a young woman returns to Mumbai to discover her roots, accompanied by a handsome Indian guide whom she romances.

programme.title: Hard Shell, Soft Shell
programme.desc: Loved-up oyster farmer Az thinks he’s made it. But when an elaborate proposal goes awry and his girlfriend Jess breaks his heart, Az is forced to confront his understanding of what happiness really looks like – both hers and his own.

programme.title: Hard Shell, Soft Shell
programme.desc: Loved-up oyster farmer Az thinks he’s made it. But when an elaborate proposal goes awry and his girlfriend Jess breaks his heart, Az is forced to confront his understanding of what happiness really looks like – both hers and his own.

programme.title: In His Hands
programme.desc: Clara, a lawyer, leads a serene but monotonous life alongside her husband Damien and their two children. One evening, she succumbs to the charm of a mysterious sculptor. This one scorching night will have dramatic repercussions for her and her family.

programme.title: The Apple of My Eye
programme.desc: Elise is beautiful, funny, and blind. Theo is a seducer but a loser. They love music. But when they meet in the elevator, it's hate at first sight.

programme.title: Passed by Censor
programme.desc: In an Istanbul prison, Zakir is tasked with reading and censoring the letters inmates receive. Tasked with a writing assignment for his night class, Zakir uses a photograph of an inmate's wife for inspiration, but fantasy soon morphs into delusion.

programme.title: My Son
programme.desc: When photographer Marlene's son Jason faces a life-altering skateboarding accident, their journey to healing takes unexpected turns. As they travel from Berlin to Switzerland, Jason slowly convinces his mother that life takes detours.

programme.title: Helen Dorn: The Seeds Of Violence
programme.desc: At the Hamburg DOM festival, Helen Dorn and forensic scientist Weyer witness a paramedic's brutal assault. When a high-society boy is later found dead, unravelling a dark secret linking the two cases.

programme.title: Celeste
programme.desc: Living in the lush rainforest of Northern Queensland, a retired opera diva prepares for one final performance. Her late husband's son Jack arrives, haunted by the past, only to discover that Celeste has one last request for him.

programme.title: Hunters On A White Field
programme.desc: Deep in the Swedish woods, three friends go on an extended weekend hunting trip. After an initial spell of success, the animals suddenly vanish without a trace. Despite being in a forest without animals, the men decide that the hunt must continue.

programme.title: The Audition
programme.desc: Violin teacher Anna Bronsky detects remarkable talent in a student, Alexander. Anna becomes obsessed with mentoring him, neglecting her family and spiralling under mounting pressure. As her fixation overtakes her, all is staked on exam day.

programme.title: Traces Of Sandalwood
programme.desc: Adopted and living in Spain for years, a young woman returns to Mumbai to discover her roots, accompanied by a handsome Indian guide whom she romances.

programme.title: Romancing The Jungle
programme.desc: Eva is a rookie journalist keen on investigating sea piracy. When she is really kidnapped by pirates in Thailand, she is forced to fight for her life. With her is a hunky smuggler called Nik, and together, the comedic duo band together to survive.

programme.title: Helen Dorn: The Last Resort
programme.desc: Haunted by a colleague's suicide and grappling with guilt, Helen Dorn confronts the unspoken accusations of her fellow officers. At the same time, she is assigned to solve a medical student's murder, where she soon uncovers their double life.

programme.title: Take Me Home
programme.desc: Take Me Home is an epic tale following the journey of a family on the verge of falling apart as they attempt to smuggle their dead grandmother across the Singapore-Malaysia border.

programme.title: Silent Screams
programme.desc: A young doctor is confronted with bad cases of abused children. She is shocked at how complicated it is to hold parents accountable. When a baby is killed, she decides to take a more active role, risking her medical license and her own life.

programme.title: Black Snow
programme.desc: Gosha is a trucker in northern Yakutia, who supplies his community with food, alongside low quality vodka which contributes to their alcoholism. When his truck breaks down during one of his trips, he finds himself alone in the wilderness.

programme.title: My Son
programme.desc: When photographer Marlene's son Jason faces a life-altering skateboarding accident, their journey to healing takes unexpected turns. As they travel from Berlin to Switzerland, Jason slowly convinces his mother that life takes detours.

programme.desc: Amid a record heatwave, we follow affluent and poor families in Mumbai, Manila and Bangkok to see how means and access impact ability to cope. What solutions are needed to deal with future heatwaves?

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Thomson Probiotic
programme.desc: Thomson ProbioGut is a premium probiotic supplement designed to support digestive health, boost immunity, and promote overall well-being. Formulated with two clinically researched Japanese probiotic strains—it helps improve gut flora, regulate bowel movements, and maintain a healthy body weight. Thomson ProbioGut 是一款优质的益生菌补充剂，专为支持消化健康、增强免疫力和促进整体健康而设计。采用两种临床研究认证的日本益生菌菌株— 有助于改善肠道菌群、调节排便，并维持健康的体重

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - OMRON BP Monitor Atrial Fibrillation HEM-7383T1
programme.desc: Stay ahead of your heart health now with the Omron BP monitor. With a single press of a button, you can now get your blood pressure readings and detect possible atrial fibrillation (AFib), helping you stay ahead of a potential stroke. OMRON 血压测量仪，一次测量即可获得血压和心律分析。通过Omron的智能算法，分析脉搏律动，帮助用户及早发现潜在心房颤动风险。心房颤动风险是脉搏间隔不规律的现象，提早发现有助于降低中风的风险。居家也能轻松监测心脏健康。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Ellixi Hair Revival Shampoo
programme.desc: A breakthrough 4-in-1 formula that colors, nourishes, volumizes, and strengthens hair—while improving scalp health in just 5 days. Powered by Korean patented polyphenol technology, it offers safe, natural grey coverage without harsh chemicals, leaving hair darker, fuller, and healthier with every wash. Ellixi发量黑洗发水，采用颠覆性的4合1配方：洗头同时染发、护发、增发量并强韧发丝，仅需5天即可改善头皮与发质。采用韩国专利多酚技术，无需染发剂或化学添加，温和自然遮盖白发。结合多酚氧化着色原理与草本养护成分，让秀发一洗更黑、更丰盈、更健康。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Karihome Gold Adult Goat Milk Powder
programme.desc: Enjoy the smooth taste of Karihome Gold Adult Goat Milk Powder, made with easy-to-digest goat milk proteins and enriched with lutein, collagen, and Omega-3. It supports eye, joint, and heart health, boosts calcium intake, and strengthens immunity. Perfect for the whole family, especially seniors, to maintain bone health and vitality with just two cups a day. Karihome Gold 成人羊奶粉口感顺滑，富含易吸收的羊奶蛋白，采用先进脱膻技术，保留营养与纯净口感，连肠胃敏感者都能安心饮用。 还特别添加叶黄素、胶原蛋白和 Omega-3，支持眼睛、关节及心脑血管健康。每天两杯，补钙增强免疫力，适合全家饮用，特别适合年长人士，助力骨骼健康与活力。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - HOTO Electric Spin Scrubber
programme.desc: The Hoto Kitchen Spin Scrubber combines power and precision in a compact, cordless design made for everyday kitchen cleaning. Equipped with a high speed motor and built in rechargeable battery, it removes grease, stains and buildup from sinks, stovetops and countertops effortlessly. 一款无线高扭矩清洁器，为轻松，深层清洁而设计。它可伸缩手柄与6种可替换刷头，轻松清洁地板，瓷砖，浴缸及狭小角落。简约奢华设计，适合每个人使用。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Health+ Nutripack Snow Fungus
programme.desc: Health+ Nutripack Snow Fungus is a non-cook fungus, ready to eat in just one minute. It contains 100% pure natural organic white fungus with no preservatives or chemical additives added. Health+雪颜银耳 ，免煮即食只需1分钟即可享用。100% 纯天然有机银耳，不添加防腐剂或化学添加剂

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Elekiban 200MT Magnet Patch for Pain Relief
programme.desc: Elekiban 200MT Magnet Patch for Pain Relief. A trusted and beloved product in Japan for over 50 years. Non-Chemical, Drug-Free Relief – Helps to relieve muscle pain without the use of heat, cold, or medication. Magnetism helps stimulate healthy blood flow and relieve your stiff muscles. Provides Targeted, Long-Lasting Effect, each patch can be used up to 5 days. 已有 50 多年的历史,在日本备受信赖和喜爱。运用磁力物理原理，不含药物成分，无需使用热敷、冷敷或药物，即可帮助缓解肌肉疼痛。磁力有助于促进健康的血液循环，进而有助于缓解肌肉僵硬。提供精准持久的缓解疼痛效果，每贴可使用长达 5 天。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Thermos TCMF-501 0.5L Mug with Strainer & Handle
programme.desc: Sleek and lightweight Thermos Mug with strainer for you to enjoy your tea to the fullest. Suitable for everyday use! 一杯多用， 茶水分离, 设计典雅的茶漏咖啡杯让你方便携带！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Philips Azur Steam Iron
programme.desc: The Philips Azur 8000 Series Steam Iron delivers powerful performance with OptimalTEMP technology, ensuring that no fabric will be burned. The intelligent temperature control guarantees no scorching, allowing you to iron both horizontally and vertically with ease. programme.desc: The 11th season of Upin & Ipin' will feature new activities like exploring around the village, getting into the imagination world with the dinosaurs and robots, exploring the sea and many more!

programme.title: Aroma Puncak Borneo S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: The journey of a nomad to the peaks of the highlands in Borneo. Exploring gastronomy and cuisine while getting to know the customs and cultures of various ethnic groups on the Land of the Hornbills.

programme.title: Bunga Salju - EP 24
programme.desc: Ekin’s attempts to win Azizi’s love backfire, leading him to seek a divorce, which she blames on Qaisara. As Leo’s plan to destroy Farouk and his company unfolds, Qaisara uncovers the truth about her real father.

programme.title: Lintas Pintas - EP 5
programme.desc: Contestants compete as a team in each episode by passing through a maze with different doors and try to accumulate as much money as possible by answering a simple multiple choice question at each door. After crossing the 10th door, the team enter their Prize Vault to collect their winning amount. Contestants stand to win up to 10,000 worth of cash and prizes.

programme.title: Pajak Raya
programme.desc: After three years away, Nonni returns to her grandmother's village, but her arrival with Naza soon stirs unrest. The villager's suspicious prove all too real for behind their smiles, Nonni and Naza hides sinister intentions that threaten to disrupt the peace of the village.

programme.title: Melodi Raya 2024
programme.desc: Raya entertainment show where hosts together with famous guest celebrities will talk about their Raya celebrations and performances by invited singers. Guest celebrities include veteran singers and new popular singers like Junainah M Amin, Bella Astilla, Adira, Aina Abdul and many others.

programme.title: Kasi Setel Itu Lirik - EP 1
programme.desc: A variety show that requires the contestants to complete the lyrics of a song on an empty board infront of them.

programme.title: Raya Tahun Depan
programme.desc: After her house is broken into by thieves, she fainted and transported by 'time travel' to the next year for a lavish celebration with her new family.

programme.title: Upin & Ipin S11 - EP 4
programme.desc: The 11th season of Upin & Ipin' will feature new activities like exploring around the village, getting into the imagination world with the dinosaurs and robots, exploring the sea and many more!

programme.title: SQFT - EP 8
programme.desc: An informative and entertaining program that aims to show the uniqueness of the versatile small house and the minimalist life. This unique tv program also shares creativity with the use of small and limited space is unlimited. Viewers will also be taken to a new Tiny house construction project from start to finish over the course of 13 episodes in SQFT's Buiuld Info segment.

programme.title: Hospital Loveline - EP 11
programme.desc: Razi becomes agitated when Sofia does not reciprocate his advances, leaving her increasingly uncomfortable. Meanwhile, Dr. Eric advises Dr. Nabila to stop pursuing Dr. Arfan, much to her dismay. Unable to accept this, she takes steps to make Dr. Arfan hers.

programme.title: Masih Ada Yang Peduli - EP 1
programme.desc: Despite death threats and tensions, Farooq and his family are committed to vaccinate children against polio in rural Balochistan. They go door-to-door in the most remote regions to give anti-polio drops to children and to provide healthcare to households.

programme.title: JMJ Beraya bersama Nat & Ella

Also, enjoy performances of trending and evergreen Raya songs with the alumni of Juara Mic Junior Season One and Two, including Alfan Ryan, Hanie Bella, Sarah Alia, Izhaan Iskandar and many more.

programme.title: Sinar Lebaran 2025
programme.desc: Sinar Lebaran 2025 reignites Raya memories in a music and drama voyage that brings you a nostalgic festive journey from the 1960s till now! Centred on Nek Yang and her great-granddaughter Fitri, she will take you through different era with performances by Ramli Sarip, Hady Mirza, Aisyah Aziz, Dayang Nurfaizah, Tomok and many more, blending tradition and laughter in a celebration of love and family.

programme.title: Air Tangan - EP 3
programme.desc: Young entrepreneur Nyla Esman treis to recreate her favourite childhood comfort food, nasi goreng udang kering, from her grandmother, Madam Rokiah. She then brings Madam Rokiah out of her comfort zoom by getting her to try her hands at Japanese/Korean fusion food, ramen tteobokki. Will her mother Nura J approve?

programme.desc: Millenia United gears up for a Ramadan charity match against Singa 65, the Legendary footballers of Singapore. It is especially challenging for those who never fasted before, to try challenge themselves just in support for the other players. Meanwhile, Fatin's cookie business takes a downturn and it is up to Hema, Anjali and Lily to help her. Tragedy strikes and Millenia United and their families wonder will they have a peaceful Hari Raya.

programme.desc: A Chinese boy fostered in an Indian family? Yes! Ming Lee, a foster child, becomes an unexpected but necessary part of the Manickam family. An amusing story of how a young boy is trying to fit in a peculiar family with different people with the added challenge of cultural and language differences.
